text:

Author: tcberner

Log:
  www/qt5-webkit: enable woff [1] support

  - woff support was automatically enabled if installed,
  - but not in clean environments, fix that.

  [1] https://www.w3.org/TR/WOFF2/

  PR:		238997
  Reported by:	Martin Birgmeier <d8zNeCFG@aon.at>
